The Venue

Where Champions
Compete

Nestled in the heart of the Barolo wine region, Alba offers a world-class sports facility surrounded by Piedmont's iconic vineyards. Professional courts, a stunning pool, and a restaurant & bar — everything in one place.

Tournament Schedule

When Do You Play?

Use this schedule to plan your registrations. You can enter multiple categories — for example, a +60 player can also register for +50, or an Intermediate player can challenge themselves in Advanced.

Schedule is subject to change. We recommend arriving one day before your first match and departing one day after your last match.

The Host Club

A Historic Venue

WPC Italy 2026 takes place at Tennis Club Alba — one of Piedmont's most storied sports clubs, founded in 1978 by a group of local philanthropists dedicated to sport and community.

Over the decades, TC Alba has hosted world-class players including Bjorn Borg, Fabio Fognini, and Andreas Seppi. In 2007, the club reached Serie 1 — the pinnacle of Italian club tennis.

Today, TC Alba is a modern multi-sport hub for Tennis, Padel, and Pickleball — with professional courts, a pool, gym, and restaurant, all set against the breathtaking backdrop of the Barolo wine region.

Visit TC Alba Website
Your Host Team
Alessandro Boero
Host · Tennis Club Alba

Alessandro welcomes players from around the world to his beloved Tennis Club Alba — a historic venue he and his team have built into one of Piedmont's finest sports destinations.

Sergio Ruiz Caro
Tournament Director · WPC Italy 2026

Sergio is the driving force behind WPC Italy 2026. As European Manager of WPC Series Europe and a Pickleball champion himself, he brings world-class tournament experience to every event he organizes.

Pep Giuliano & Vittoria De Pasquale
Pickleball Instructors · Team Alba

Pep Giuliano (IPTPA 2nd Level) and Vittoria De Pasquale (Professional PPR) are part of the TC Alba team and will be on court throughout the tournament to support players and ensure a top-level experience.

Contact the Organizer
Official Accommodation

Book Your Hotel

Alessandro Boero has secured exclusive room contingents at the best prices in Alba — exclusively for WPC Italy 2026 participants. Book directly through him for guaranteed tournament rates and personalized support.

Request Your Booking
Fill in your details and Alessandro will confirm your reservation with exclusive tournament rates.
Alessandro Boero has blocked room contingents at the best market prices exclusively for WPC Italy 2026 participants. He is available to speak with every team coach personally and help find the best accommodation. Taxi transfers to TC Alba are also available at preferential rates. Your request will be sent to both Alessandro and Tournament Director Sergio Ruiz Caro.
